zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Balster於大約1677年出生在英國戴文宏尼頓時，她的父親Richard Balster39歲，母親Joan Pittfield45歲。她於1698年12月24日與Charles Pine在英國戴文宏尼頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1768年3月3日之前，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Balster于大约1677年出生在英国戴文宏尼頓时，她的父亲Richard Balster39岁，母亲Joan Pittfield45岁。她于1698年12月24日与Charles Pine在英国戴文宏尼頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1768年3月3日之前，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Balster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name or nickname from Middle English balester, balister ‘crossbowman’ (Old French balestre). Compare Ballester .
North German and Dutch: metathesis of   Baltzer  . This surname is found mainly in the borderland of Münsterland (Germany) and Overijssel (Netherlands).

variants.name: Bolster
meanings: English: occupational name for a bowl maker, from Middle English bolster ‘bowl maker’. Alternatively, a variant of Balster . This English name was taken to Ireland (Cork) early in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ballester
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ricardo, Jose, Luis, Domingo, Jorge, Juan, Magda, Pilar, Roberto, Ana, Andres, Aura.

Catalan: occupational name for a maker of crossbows or a soldier armed with a crossbow, from Catalan ballester ‘crossbowman’ or ‘crossbow maker’, an agent derivative of ballesta ‘crossbow’ (from Latin ballista ‘(military) catapult’).

English (of Norman origin): variant of Arblaster, an occupational name cognate with 1 above, from Anglo-Norman French alblaster, arblaster, Old French arbalestier, arbelestier ‘soldier armed with a crossbow; arbalest’. Compare Balster .

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

historicEvents.title: Gregorian Calendar is Adopted
historicEvents.description: Gregorian calendar was adopted in England in 1752. That year, Wednesday, September 2, 1752, was followed by Thursday, September 14th, 1752, which caused the country to skip ahead eleven days.
Historical Boundaries: 1760: Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Massachusetts, United States 1820: Cumberland, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Balster was born about 1677, in Honiton, Devon, England, her father, Richard Balster, was 39 and her mother, Joan Pittfield, was 45. She married Charles Pine on 24 December 1698, in Honiton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 3 March 1768, and was buried in Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Balster est née environ 1677, à Honiton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Balster, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan Pittfield, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Charles Pine le 24 décembre 1698, à Honiton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 3 mars 1768, et a été enterrée à Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Balster um 1677 in Honiton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Balster 39 und ihre Mutter Joan Pittfield 45. Sie hat am 24. Dezember 1698 in Honiton, Devon, England Charles Pine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 3. März 1768 und wurde in Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Balster è nata il circa 1677 nel Honiton, Devon, England, sua padre, Richard Balster, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Joan Pittfield, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Charles Pine il 24 dicembre 1698, nel Honiton, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 3 marzo 1768, e fu sepolta a Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Balsterが約1677年にイギリスデボンホーニトンで生まれた時，父Richard Balsterは39歳，母Joan Pittfieldは45歳であった。1698年12月24日にイギリスデボンホーニトンでCharles Pineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1768年3月3日以前に死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニークウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Balster(이)가 대략 1677년 영국 데폰 호니턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Balster(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Pittfield(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1698년 12월 24일 영국 데폰 호니턴에서 Charles Pine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1768년 3월 3일 이전 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 c벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Balster nasceu aproximadamente 1677, em Honiton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Balster, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan Pittfield, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Charles Pine em 24 de dezembro de 1698, em Honiton, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 3 de março de 1768, e foi sepultada em Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Balster родилась около 1677 г. в местности хонитон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Balster было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Pittfield, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles Pine 24 декабря 1698 г. в местности хонитон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 3 марта 1768 г. и была похоронена в местности кумбирланд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grace Balster nació aproximadamente 1677, en Honiton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Balster, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan Pittfield, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Charles Pine el 24 de diciembre de 1698, en Honiton, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 3 de marzo de 1768, y fue sepultada en Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
